title: MongoDB Q1 FY2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: MongoDB Q1 FY2024 generated total revenue of $368.3 million, up 29% year-over-year. Atlas revenue grew 40% YoY, representing 65% of total revenue. Customer count: 43,100+, added approximately 2,300 in the quarter. Gross margin: 76%, up from 75% YoY. Operating margin: 12%, versus 6% YoY. Net income: $45.3 million with $0.56 per share. Dev Ittycheria noted Atlas grew 40% in the quarter with strong customer retention reinforcing enduring platform value. Q2 FY2024 guidance: Revenue $388-392 million, Non-GAAP operating income $36-39 million. Full Year FY2024 guidance: Revenue $1.522-1.542 billion, Operating margin 7.7%, improved approximately 300 basis points. The company highlighted AI as a growth catalyst, noting over 200 new AI/ML customers in Q1, including companies like Hugging Face and Nuro. Management emphasized their North Star strategy of acquiring high-quality workloads from both new and existing customers, stating this approach drove record new workload additions.
